data.title: Rich Sparkle (ANPA.US) to create commercial entity with top stars for 700M fans, combining US stock platform, global IP, and Chinese e-commerce.
data.description: A new commercial entity is being formed by merging a US stock platform, top global IP, and Chinese e-commerce industrialization. Rich Sparkle Holdings, a company listed in the US under the ticker symbol ANPA.US, is spearheading this initiative. The merger is set to create a powerful business entity that will operate at the intersection of these key sectors. The announcement was made in New York and Hong Kong on January 15, 2026. This move is expected to combine the strengths of each sector, propelling the entity to new heights in both the US and Chinese markets.

data.title: Blackline Safety reports fiscal 2025 revenue of $150.5 million and adjusted EBITDA of $6.1 million.
data.description: In Calgary, Canada, Blackline Safety Corp. (TSX: BLN), a prominent player in connected safety technology, has divulged its fiscal Q4 and annual financial outcomes for the period concluding on October 31, 2025. The company saw robust performance over the quarter, culminating in a remarkable fiscal year marked by substantial growth in high-margin recurring service revenue and meticulous operational strategies. The success is attributed to the constant proliferation of recurring service revenue and stringent management tactics.

data.title: Newport LLC welcomes Arra G. Yerganian as Partner, a brand expert with 35 years of experience.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, Newport LLC, a business advisory firm operating nationwide for privately owned companies, revealed the addition of Arra G. Yerganian as a Partner. Yerganian, a seasoned brand strategist and growth expert, brings over 35 years of experience to the firm.

data.title: Matson stock (MATX) rises on positive Q4 results and outlook for 2026. Q4 expected income between $135-145M, EPS between $4.22-4.70. Indices S&P 500 and Nasdaq also up. Shipping sector favorable environment. Full story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: Matson, Inc. (NYSE: MATX) saw an increase in stock value after announcing preliminary fourth-quarter results and a positive forecast for 2026. The stock's rise coincided with broader market gains, with the S&P 500 increasing by 0.36% and the Nasdaq by 0.82%, indicating a favorable climate for the shipping and logistics industry. Matson expects fourth-quarter consolidated operating income to be between $135 million and $145 million, with net income and diluted EPS estimated to be between $131.3 million and $146.3 million, and $4.22 to $4.70, respectively. The company foresees 2026 consolidated operating income approaching the level of 2025, driven by robust U.S. consumer demand and a steady Transpacific tradelane. Fourth-quarter container volumes rose in Hawaii by 0.6%, while experiencing declines in Alaska by 3.3%, China by 7.2%, and increases in Guam by 4.4%, and 11.6% elsewhere.

data.title: IDEXX launches ImageVue DR50 Plus, offering high-definition imaging with lowest radiation dose, improving diagnosis speed and staff safety.
data.description: A new technology called ImageVue DR50 Plus has been introduced in Westbrook, Maine. This technology offers high-definition diagnostic imaging while using the lowest dose of radiation. This advancement enables quicker diagnosis and enhances staff safety.

data.title: Semiconductor industry to hit $1 trillion in 2026 due to AI demand, with revenues increasing by 20.3% YoY in 2025.
data.description: In London, it has been reported that global semiconductor revenues are projected to surpass $1 trillion in 2026, a monumental achievement for the industry as revealed by Omdia's recent market analysis. This notable growth is primarily attributed to the substantial increase in memory and logic Integrated Circuit (IC) revenues, propelled by the high demand from the Artificial Intelligence (AI) market. The semiconductor revenue forecast for 2025 has seen a substantial rise of 20.3% year-over-year (YoY), with the strong performance in the third quarter of 2025 surpassing expectations. Additionally, robust growth is expected to continue in the fourth quarter of 2025.

data.title: zvoove Group appoints Otto Lepikkö as COO, effective Jan 1, 2026, leading software provider for staffing, security, and cleaning industries.
data.description: MUNICH - On January 15, 2026, zvoove Group, a prominent software and AI solutions provider for temporary staffing, private security, and cleaning sectors, revealed the selection of Otto Lepikkö as the Chief Operating Officer (COO) starting from January 1, 2026. Mr. Lepikkö will be responsible for overseeing operations within the company.

data.title: Bitmine Immersion Technologies secures $200 million investment from prominent institutional investors for Beast Industries. Hold Annual Stockholder Meeting on Jan 15, 2026 at Wynn Las Vegas.
data.description: Bitmine's Annual Stockholder Meeting is scheduled to take place on January 15, 2026, at the prestigious Wynn Las Vegas. The company boasts support from a notable consortium of institutional investors, including prominent names like ARK's Cathie Wood, MOZAYYX, Founders Fund, Bill Miller III, Pantera, Kraken, DCG, Galaxy Digital, and a personal investor. This partnership reflects the confidence and backing of key players in the industry.

data.title: Envision introduces Dubhe, first energy foundation model for AI energy system. Global leader in green tech. ABU DHABI, UAE, Jan. 15, 2026.
data.description: Envision is reinforcing its commitment to renewable energy by introducing Dubhe, a cutting-edge energy foundation model that is reshaping the AI energy system. The company, a prominent player in green technology, revealed this innovation on Jan. 15, 2026 in ABU DHABI, UAE. This launch marks a significant step forward in revolutionizing the energy sector, highlighting Envision's dedication to sustainable solutions.

data.title: CapaSystems launches CapaOne, a cloud-based management platform, extending Microsoft Intune. European-built with 30+ years experience.
data.description: CapaSystems A/S, a prominent European company with over 30 years of experience in endpoint management and cybersecurity innovation, has unveiled a new platform that integrates endpoint operations into a unified operational layer for IT teams. Based in Copenhagen, Denmark, the platform streamlines operations and enhances efficiency for modern IT teams. This development marks a significant milestone for the company as it continues to lead in the industry.

data.title: Elevate Healthcare Marketing appoints Karen Beckert as EVP, Client Engagement with 20+ years of experience in the industry.
data.description: In Blue Bell, Pennsylvania on January 15, 2026, Elevate Healthcare Marketing shared the news of Karen Beckert's appointment. Beckert, a veteran in healthcare marketing, brings over 20 years of expertise from her time at Biolumina, Digitas Health, and Ogilvy Health. She has now joined Elevate to strengthen the team with her extensive agency and client engagement background.
